subject: A split-panel illustration of an abandoned, overgrown gymnasium: left panel shows the building's exterior haunted by a ghostly face in the wall and a spider/cocoon hanging from creeping dead branches; right panel shows the interior weight room with derelict exercise equipment, weight benches and a treadmill being consumed by vines, moss, and decay under sickly green light.
description: A two-panel composition depicting a ruined fitness facility. The left panel is the building's exterior: a wood-frame gymnasium with broken windows and a basketball-hoop-like rim hanging at center; dead branches and brambles invade the structure, and a pale, screaming ghost-face manifests on the wall in the upper left. A swollen spider or cocoon dangles from webs in the upper right against a sickly yellow-green sky, and a leafless tree stands in the dirt foreground. The right panel pulls inside to a weight room: a treadmill console with a hanging arm, abandoned weight benches, a barbell rack, and exercise equipment sit caked in moss and overgrowth, all bathed in toxic emerald light pouring through a doorway. Twisted black branches arc across the top of both panels, framing the scene. The palette is bilious greens, sickly yellows, rotted browns, and inky blacks. No human figures are present.
foreground: leafless tree and dirt ground on the left panel; abandoned treadmill, weight bench, barbell, and gym equipment on the right panel
background: decaying gymnasium wall with a ghost-face apparition and a hanging cocoon/spider on the left; toxic green-lit doorway and overgrown room interior on the right; black branches framing both panels
emotion: dread; abandonment; the silence of a place where life used to thrive now overtaken by rot
